data.title: Eaton completes acquisition of leading liquid-cooling solutions provider Boyd Thermal, creating an industry-leading grid-to-chip solution for data centers
data.description: Eaton, a leading intelligent power management company listed on NYSE as ETN, recently finalized the purchase of Boyd Thermal business from Boyd Corporation, formerly owned by Goldman Sachs Asset Management. The acquisition brings on board Boyd Thermal, a prominent provider of thermal components, systems, and ruggedized solutions catering to various industries like data centers and aerospace. With a specialization in liquid cooling, Boyd Thermal's addition equips Eaton to address the increasing demand fueled by AI technologies. This move positions Eaton to offer comprehensive solutions spanning from grid infrastructure to end-user applications.

data.title: Motorola Solutions Appoints Peter Leav to Board of Directors
data.description: Motorola Solutions, a leading provider of safety and security solutions, has appointed Peter Leav to its board of directors. Leav, a senior advisor at TPG, has over 25 years of leadership experience in the software technology sector, specializing in driving growth for large-scale companies. Greg Brown, chairman and CEO of Motorola Solutions, expressed enthusiasm for Leav joining the board, citing his expertise and track record. Leav's appointment underscores the company's commitment to strategic leadership, with a focus on leveraging his industry experience for future growth opportunities.

data.title: PagerDuty Expands AI Ecosystem to Supercharge AI Agents and Deliver Autonomous Operations
data.description: In San Francisco, PagerDuty, Inc. (NYSE:PD) unveiled an expansion of its AI integration ecosystem. This enhancement of its PagerDuty Advance agents and AI platform is aimed at assisting organizations in achieving autonomous operations. With a rising development pace and increased AI code production, a pressing challenge for the industry is to prevent code from breaking during production. PagerDuty has now incorporated more features into its platform to address this challenge and optimize operations.

data.title: Allurion Advances Plan to Regain Listing Compliance
data.description: NATICK, Mass.--Allurion Technologies, Inc. released a statement appealing the New York Stock Exchange's decision to begin delisting proceedings for the company's securities under Section 802.01B of the NYSE’s Listed Company Manual. This section mandates listed companies to uphold an average global market capitalization over 30 consecutive trading days of at least a certain unspecified amount. The company, identified under the ticker ALUR and specializing in metabolically healthy weight loss solutions, is pushing back against the NYSE's move.
The US won't issue duties for battery material imports from China.

data.title: Inc. Names Kumo Co-Founder, Dr. Hema Raghavan, to Its 2026 Female Founders 500 List
data.description: The annual Female Founders list by Inc. showcases the country's top women entrepreneurs, who in total produced around $12.3 billion in revenue in 2025. Located in MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., on March 12, 2026, Kumo excitedly reveals Dr. Hema Raghavan as their Co-Founder and Head, highlighting her achievements.

data.title: Vertex Achieves Remarkable Growth, Sets New Industry Standard with ServiceTitan
data.description: A leading roofing company has seen remarkable growth, surpassing $600 million in revenue through strategic acquisitions. Over the past three years, they have acquired 30 companies, a move that has propelled their success. This achievement was made possible by utilizing ServiceTitan’s robust enterprise platform, enabling the company to streamline operations and scale efficiently.

data.title: Voting Rights and Shares Capital of the Company
data.description: As per Article L.233-8 II of the French Commercial Code and Article 223-16 of the General Regulation of the French Financial Markets Authority (Autorité des Marchés Financiers), companies are required to disclose key financial information and adhere to regulations set forth by the authorities.

data.title: Mercury Systems Acquires SolderMask To Support Higher Rate Production
data.description: Mercury Systems, Inc., a global technology company, revealed on March 12, 2026, the acquisition of SolderMask, Inc. This move aims to enhance Mercury's capabilities in delivering mission-critical processing to the edge. Mercury, trading on NASDAQ under MRCY and known for its innovative solutions, acquired SolderMask to bolster its specialized manufacturing processes in support of crucial Mercury programs entering production phases. This strategic acquisition marks a significant development in Mercury's growth trajectory.

data.title: NervGen Pharma Announces Voluntary Delisting from TSX Venture Exchange
data.description: VANCOUVER, Canada, March 12, 2026 - NervGen Pharma Corp., a biopharmaceutical company focusing on innovative neuroreparative treatments for spinal cord injury (SCI) and other neurological conditions, disclosed its decision to voluntarily remove its common shares from TSX Venture Exchange ("TSXV"). The delisting will become official after market closure on March 16, 2026. NervGen is listed as NGEN on TSXV and also on NASDAQ with the same symbol.

data.title: Plus Therapeutics Reports 2025 Results, Business Progress and 2026 Anticipated Milestones for REYOBIQ™ Clinical Program and CNSide® Commercial Rollout
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Plus Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: PSTV) shared its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. Plus, a healthcare firm specializing in precision diagnostics and radiopharmaceuticals for CNS cancers, outlined recent and forthcoming business highlights.

data.title: TEAM, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Sugar Land, Texas, TEAM, Inc. (NYSE: TISI), a prominent global provider of specialty industrial services, disclosed its financial performance for the period ending December 31, 2025. The company offers a comprehensive range of conventional, specialized, and proprietary inspection, heat-treating, and mechanical services to its customers. This included its results for both the fourth quarter and the full year.

data.title: Trade investigation by Trump admin targets forced labor policies in dozens of countries to combat exploitation.
data.description: The Trump administration is gearing up to launch a trade investigation into the labor practices of numerous countries. The investigation will focus on determining if these countries have implemented policies to address forced labor. This move signifies a proactive stance on combating labor exploitation globally. The investigation is anticipated to cover a substantial number of countries, with exact figures yet to be disclosed. This initiative reflects a commitment to scrutinizing international labor standards and enforcing accountability in combating forced labor practices.

data.title: Turtle Beach Corporation Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, the company reported a net revenue of $118.8 million, with a full-year net revenue reaching $319.9 million. Gross margin also saw improvement, rising to 40.1% in the fourth quarter and 37.3% for the entire year 2025. Net income for the fourth quarter was $17.6 million, while for the full year it was $15.7 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $28.1 million in the fourth quarter and $40.1 million for the year 2025. The company also announced it is providing revenue and Adjusted EBITDA guidance for the full year 2026.

data.title: Bank of America Declares Preferred Stock Dividends Payable in April and May 2026
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Bank of America Corporation revealed that its Board of Directors has approved regular cash dividends for the outstanding shares or depositary shares of specific series of preferred stock. The dividends per share for the mentioned preferred stock series were disclosed but the specific amounts were not provided in the news release. This announcement signifies the company's commitment to providing returns to its investors and reinforcing its financial stability.

data.title: Nektar Therapeutics Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Nektar Therapeutics (Nasdaq: NKTR) announced its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter ending December 31, 2025. The company disclosed having $245.8 million in cash and marketable securities by the end of 2025, in comparison to $269.1 million from the previous report.
